<!-- dropbox: https://www.dropbox.com/preview/CbDD_Dienstordner/literatur/altes%20corpus/chunked/chunked/Band04_chunk003.pdf#page=14 -->
<!-- citation-page-top: Band04 p126 -->

<!-- header: KLOSTERGEBAUDE -->


[[File:Band04_chunk003_p014_img001.jpg|thumb]]



[[File:Band04_chunk003_p014_img002.jpg|thumb|V<sub>2</sub> Rentamt Burghausen, Fürstenfeldbruck, Heimatmuseum (Photo G. und E. von Voithenberg)]]
<!-- citation-page-bottom: Band04 p127 -->
